project.name: PDP Rebuild (Replo → Native Liquid)
project.description: Rebuild the main Replo product detail page (template 10dc3372) as a native Liquid section in the teeccino-dawn-refresh theme. 99 products use this template. Goal: eliminate Replo dependency so ThemeSmith can directly maintain, update, and optimize PDPs. Scope is bound to live-page functionality only (see pdp-live-spec.md) — Replo-chunk features not present on the live page are dropped. Secondary: rebuild 3 other Replo templates (15 products total) after main template is complete.

milestones.label: M1: Spec & project plan complete (live-page spec v2 authored 2026-04-15)
M2: Hero — image gallery (Swiper, variant_image_1-6), product info card (title, price, caffeine badge, description, testimonial, nutrition link), variant tile grid
M3: Buy box — Subscribe & Save / One-Time toggle (One-Time default), selling_plan hidden input, ADD TO CART button, OCU hook preserved

M4: Supporting sections — FAQ accordion (3 items), 'Discover the Benefits' accordion (5 items), trust bar (4 icons), 'Bold Flavors' ingredient chips, 'How to brew' 2-col accordion (hard-coded, product-type switched — metaobject deemed unnecessary after Shopkeeper audit), Nutrition+Ingredients modal, Meet Caroline, Loox embed anchor
M5: Cross-sell carousel — sister-product slider (handle-suffix matching, renders N cards for every existing sibling format; e.g. French Roast = Coffee+Tea+Instant Coffee+Instant Latte)
M6: Client-side JS — variant switching (images, price, compare-at, SAVE %, caffeine badge, tile highlight, URL), pub/sub integration with theme's variant-change event
M7: Visual QA — side-by-side vs live Replo PDP at 375 / 750 / 990 / 1440, a11y audit (WCAG 2.1 AA), cross-browser (Chrome/Safari/Firefox)
M8: Migration — assign native template to 3-5 test products, validate end-to-end (ATC, subscribe, OCU, Loox), then bulk reassign remaining 99
M9: Secondary templates — rebuild 0e592c64 (samplers, 9 products), e8db7446 (gift boxes, 4 products), 2b04f633 (seasonal, 2 products)
M10: Retire Replo runtime on PDPs — remove Replo template files, unsubscribe from Replo CDN script for product pages

tasks.description: Build variant image gallery section (Swiper v11 main + thumbnail strip, mobile swipe + desktop arrows, 1:1 ratio, 5-6 slides from custom.variant_image_1-6, 'New Look / Same Great Taste' corner ribbon on slide 1 when variant.custom.new_packaging == true with gradient #B17BA8→#7998AE→#84ADA7→#7998AE)
tasks.notes: Files: sections/main-pdp-hero.liquid, snippets/pdp-hero-ribbon.liquid, assets/component-pdp-hero.css, assets/pdp-hero.js, templates/product.pdp-rebuild.json. Test product: gid://shopify/Product/9478059000056 ('[PDP Rebuild Test] French Roast'). Commit 32b7e62 on dev branch. Verified 6 slides + 6 thumbs + ribbon on slide 1 at 1440/990/375.

tasks.description: Product info card — title, Loox inline stars + review count, subtitle (type | size), caffeine pill badge (green, from custom.caffeine_mg), price + compare-at + SAVE % tag
tasks.notes: Added to sections/main-pdp-hero.liquid: Loox inline stars anchor, h1 title, subtitle (type | variant title) + green caffeine pill, price block with compare-at strikethrough + SAVE % math (save_amount * 100 / compare_at). Styles in component-pdp-hero.css. Verified at 1440/990/375 on French Roast test product.

tasks.description: Testimonial rotating card — new 'testimonial' metaobject (image, customer_name, quote, star_rating) + product-level list-reference metafield. Section rotates through N testimonials with prev/next chevrons
tasks.notes: Cream-bg card with 6rem avatar, gold #F5B000 stars, prev/next chevron nav (prev top / next bottom) + dots. initTestimonials() in pdp-hero.js: .is-active class toggling, 7s auto-advance, hover/focus pause. Verified next-button advanced JACQUELINE O. → PRIYA S. Metaobject + metafield definitions created in t1 prep.

tasks.description: Variant tile grid — up to 4 tiles, variant image + label, active state (cream fill + checkmark), sold-out state (55% opacity), full-navigation links
tasks.notes: Grid: auto-fit minmax(12rem, 1fr) on mobile, repeat(4, 1fr) at 750px+. Each tile = <a> to variant URL, image from variant.metafields.custom.variant_image_1 (fallback to featured_media), label=variant.title. .is-selected gets cream fill + green circular checkmark badge; .is-sold-out gets 55% opacity + pointer-events:none. Client-side swap in M6.

tasks.description: Subscribe & Save / One-Time radio group. One-Time default selected. Subscribe card shows '22% OFF Recurring' + 4 benefit bullets + chevron expand
tasks.notes: Subscribe row renders only when variant.selling_plan_allocations is non-empty (graceful fallback otherwise). Discount % computed as (compare_at - subscribe_price) / compare_at — matches live page math. Chevron expand/collapse with aria-expanded + hidden attribute on benefits list; stopPropagation prevents chevron click from flipping the radio. Created throwaway SellingPlanGroup/2247327992 (SellingPlan 5908758776 @ 22% off) for QA; left in place for future M3/M6 testing — delete when project closes.

tasks.description: Add-to-cart form — standard Shopify <form action='/cart/add'> with hidden id, quantity=1, selling_plan. Wire selling_plan assignment to sub-radio. Preserve OCU compatibility
tasks.notes: Standard Shopify <form action='/cart/add'> with hidden id, quantity=1, selling_plan. Radios dispatch change events that swap selling_plan input between '' (one-time) and plan.id (subscribe). Button carries [data-atc-button] for OCU compatibility. Disabled + 'SOLD OUT' label when !variant.available. Verified via page.evaluate: selling_plan input flips '' → 5908758776 on subscribe-radio change.

tasks.description: FAQ accordion section — 3 schema-driven collapsibles with chevron rotation, ARIA (aria-expanded/controls, role=button)
tasks.notes: sections/pdp-faq.liquid + assets/component-pdp-sections.css. Uses native <details>/<summary> for free a11y (keyboard, screen reader). Chevron rotates 180deg via [open] selector. 3 default blocks preset with live-page questions. Wired into templates/product.pdp-rebuild.json as 'faq' section.

tasks.description: 'Discover the Benefits' section — 5-block accordion (No Jitters / Acid Free / Antioxidants / Natural Energy Boost / Happy Gut), colored icons, side hero image
tasks.notes: sections/pdp-benefits.liquid. 5 blocks (No Jitters 😌 / Acid Free 💧 / Antioxidants 🧪 / Natural Energy Boost ⚡ / Happy Gut 🌿) with per-block color picker for icon bg. Icon accepts image_picker OR emoji fallback. Optional side_image on desktop. <details>-based accordion. Brand palette colors (#F5B000, #7998AE, #84ADA7, #E39A5F, #B17BA8) preset.

tasks.description: Trust bar — 4-icon row (Organic Herbs / Acid Free / Prebiotics / GMO Free), schema-driven so blocks are editable
tasks.notes: sections/pdp-trust-bar.liquid. 4 blocks: Organic Herbs / Acid Free / Prebiotics / GMO Free (per live spec). image_picker per block, title + subtitle text fields. Responsive: 1-col mobile → 2-col tablet (750px) → 4-col desktop (990px). Color scheme settable (default background-2 = beige band).

tasks.description: 'Bold Flavors' ingredient chips section — pill-row of key ingredients (e.g. Carob / Barley / Chicory / Dates). Data source: catalog existing metafield or introduce new one (e.g. custom.bold_flavors as list.single_line_text_field)
tasks.notes: sections/pdp-bold-flavors.liquid. Data source: existing product metafields (no new schema needed) — custom.ingredient_header_1..8 for labels, custom.ingredient_image_1..8 for images, custom.flavornotes2 for subheading. Live PDP caps at 4 chips despite 5-8 slots populated; section defaults max_chips=4 with schema range 1-8. Dynamic bracket access silently fails in Liquid — unrolled 1..8 with case/when. Empty state flagged in theme editor preview only. Commit 4e5c54d.

tasks.description: 'How to brew' section — 2-col split (accordion + lifestyle image). After Shopkeeper audit, simplified to hard-coded product-type switched content (no metaobject needed — live Replo PDP uses identical 3 content variants across 101 products; metaobject would add data-entry cost for zero personalization benefit).
tasks.notes: sections/pdp-how-to-brew.liquid + snippets/pdp-brew-method.liquid. Switches on product.type: 'Herbal Coffee'/'Herbal Tea' → 4-method accordion (French Press, Drip, Pour-over, Tea Bags, inline SVG icons); 'Instant Coffee' → 3-step Sip Instantly w/ 1½ tsp; 'Instant Latte' → 3-step Sip Instantly w/ 2 tbsp; else section not rendered. Uses native <details>/<summary> (zero JS), same a11y pattern as pdp-faq. Copy extracted verbatim from live Replo. Shopkeeper audit confirmed no per-product brewing metafield exists. Verified on all 4 product-type paths (flipped 3 products' templates for QA, reverted). Parser gotcha fixed: Liquid single-quoted strings can't escape apostrophes with ''; swapped for curly ’ (memory rule saved). Commit 99b15f9, pushed to origin/dev @ b54a626.

tasks.description: Nutrition + Ingredients modal — builds nutrition-facts block from existing nutrition metafields (catalog them: serving size, calories, fat, sodium, etc.). Focus trap + ESC close per a11y
tasks.notes: sections/pdp-nutrition.liquid + snippets/pdp-nutrition-row.liquid + assets/pdp-nutrition.js. Trigger pill between Bold Flavors and FAQ opens a native <dialog> with FDA-style nutrition label (rule lines, bold nutrient labels, % Daily Value col, indented Saturated/Trans Fat + Sugars rows) + Inulin soluble-fiber highlight + rich-text ingredients from tab_content.ingredients. Consumes 16 custom.* metafields + 1 tab_content metafield. A11y: aria-haspopup/controls, aria-labelledby, ESC + backdrop dismiss, focus return to trigger on close, body scroll-lock. Verified desktop + mobile on test product 9478059000056. Commit 0c1eda5, pushed to origin/dev @ 91096c1.

tasks.description: Meet Caroline founder section — static block with image + tagline + bio + 'Read our story' link
tasks.notes: sections/pdp-meet-caroline.liquid — 2-col desktop (image + copy), stacked mobile. Eyebrow 'BLENDING FOR YOU SINCE 1993', heading, richtext bio, CTA link to /pages/our-story. Shared styles in component-pdp-sections.css (.pdp-caroline). Image picker is optional — gracefully degrades to copy-only when empty. Commit 703758e.

tasks.description: Loox anchor + inline stars — <div id='looxReviews' data-product-id='{{ product.id }}'> embed + inline Loox stars in hero
tasks.notes: sections/pdp-loox.liquid — slot for Loox external widget binding. Contains <div id='looxReviews' data-product-id='{{ product.id }}'>. Heading + padding configurable. Matches M2 info-card inline-stars anchor (#looxReviews scroll target). Inline stars in hero already shipped in M2. Commit 703758e.

tasks.description: Sister-product carousel — handle-suffix matching detects all sibling formats (coffee/tea/instant-coffee/instant-latte). Render N cards in a sliding carousel with gold-dashed borders. Example: French Roast = 4 cards; Almond Amaretto ground = 1 card (tea only). Scroll-snap or Swiper implementation TBD.
tasks.notes: sections/pdp-cross-sell.liquid + snippets/pdp-cross-sell-card.liquid. Swiper v11 implementation. Handle-derivation strips leading 'instant-' + trailing '-herbal-{coffee,tea,latte}'. base_handle_override setting for edge cases like test product. Manual product pin blocks for variety-packs / samplers. Verified live on test PDP: 4 sibling cards (Coffee / Tea / Instant Coffee / Instant Latte) with gold dashed borders, color-coded badges, compare-at pricing. Responsive 1.15→2.5→3→4 slides across mobile/tablet/desktop/wide. Commits a7bc36f + d6d2fb9 on dev.

tasks.description: Variant switching JS — on variant-change event: swap gallery slides, update price + compare-at + SAVE %, update caffeine badge, update tile highlight, history.replaceState URL
tasks.notes: Implemented via Shopify Section Rendering API (fetch `/products/{handle}?variant={id}&section_id={id}`) rather than client-side DOM patching — lets Liquid re-render the whole hero (price / compare-at / SAVE % / caffeine pill / subtitle / tile highlight / gallery slides) in one round-trip, no duplicated variant data in JS. Click-delegation on tile grid + keyboard arrow nav. history.replaceState updates URL with ?variant= without full navigation. Spinner on clicked tile + aria-busy on hero during swap. On success: re-init Swiper galleries, testimonials, buy box, publish PUB_SUB_EVENTS.variantChange. On failure: fallback to tile.href full navigation. Verified swap: $16.99 → $89.99, compare-at $18.49 → $98.99, SAVE 8% → 9%, subtitle '11 ounce ground' → '5lb ground', gallery image swapped, URL updated, 418ms elapsed, no full page nav. Files: assets/pdp-hero.js, assets/component-pdp-hero.css, sections/main-pdp-hero.liquid (added data-section-id + data-product-url). Commits 2460616 + f845a89.

tasks.description: Integrate with theme pub/sub (PUB_SUB_EVENTS.variantChange + cartUpdate). Verify OCU still fires on ATC after rebuild
tasks.notes: swapVariant() publishes PUB_SUB_EVENTS.variantChange with {data: {variant, sectionId, html}} payload after successful section re-render — mirrors Dawn's native variant-change contract so any downstream subscribers (cart drawer, dynamic checkout buttons) see the change. OCU compatibility preserved via untouched [data-atc-button] selector on the ATC form inside the re-rendered hero. Post-swap re-inits Swiper galleries + testimonials + buy box since the new innerHTML wipes their instances.

tasks.description: Side-by-side pixel-diff vs live Replo at 375 / 750 / 990 / 1440 widths. Capture before/after screenshots
tasks.notes: Captured 5 screenshots (rebuild@1440/375 + live@1440/990/750). Structural parity with live — testimonial card, buy box, trust bar, benefits accordion, ingredient chips, cross-sell carousel, Meet Caroline all present. Differences are intentional polish (darker testimonial contrast, cleaner pill badges, collapsed How-to-Brew when no lifestyle image). No blocking visual regressions.

tasks.description: A11y audit — WCAG 2.1 AA (keyboard nav, focus trap on modals, color contrast, ARIA on accordions + radios)
tasks.notes: axe-core 4.9.1 WCAG 2.1 AA audit. Initial: 5 violations (pdp-testimonial__stars aria-prohibited-attr, pdp-testimonial__dots aria-required-children tablist, pdp-hero__caffeine-pill + __save-pill contrast 2.98:1 fail, pdp-hero__price-compare + pdp-cross-sell__price-compare contrast fails, 3 pastel cross-sell badges fail). Fixed all 5 across commits ff7d55b / 64f4aa4 / 7a482af: role=img on stars, role=group on dots (pagination not tabs), pills #3BAF4A → #2C7A38 (5.4:1), compare-at 0.5/0.55 → 0.68 opacity (4.7:1), badges #84ADA7/#B17BA8/#E39A5F → #2F7A72/#7D3F74/#B4601E, alt='' on variant tile imgs. Final: 0 in-theme violations, 35 passes. Remaining `shop-follow-button` + `#PBarNextFrame` violations are 3rd-party (Shop Pay web component + Shopify preview bar iframe) — not theme code.

tasks.description: Assign native template to 3-5 test products (Almond Amaretto coffee + 1 tea + 1 instant + 1 latte). Validate ATC, subscribe flow, OCU upsell, Loox rendering, variant switching end-to-end
Bulk reassign remaining 99 products from replo.10dc3372 template to new native template
Analyze secondary Replo templates (0e592c64 samplers, e8db7446 gift boxes, 2b04f633 seasonal) against live pages and build native equivalents
Remove Replo template files + Replo CDN script for product pages. Verify no PDP still routes through Replo. Close project.

POLISH (live QA 2026-04-16): Trust bar color scheme — text (Made with organic herbs / Acid Free / Rich in prebiotics / GMO Free) barely legible on dark background. Switch to lighter scheme or increase contrast.
tasks.notes: Root cause: original bug report was against an earlier darker scheme; by polish time the template already used background-2 (cream #fff1db with #121212 text, 15.33:1 AAA contrast). Real polish opportunity was the empty image_picker slots leaving the bar text-only and sparse. Added 4 inline SVG fallback icons (leaf / droplet / sprout / shield-check) with select-option schema binding, wrapped in circular tinted chip (bg rgba(fg,0.06), color #6b3327 dark-roast brown), sized 4.8rem with 2.8rem glyph. Tightened typography (title 1.55rem, subtitle 1.3rem at 0.82 opacity vs 0.72). Verified at 1440 + 375. Commit cb2c65b.

tasks.description: POLISH (live QA 2026-04-16): How to Brew lifestyle image slot renders as an empty grey box on live test PDP. Either upload a default image or hide the side-image container when image setting is empty.
tasks.notes: Removed Shopify's `placeholder_svg_tag 'lifestyle-1'` fallback entirely. When section.settings.lifestyle_image is blank, the entire .pdp-brew__visual wrapper is not rendered and the grid gets a .pdp-brew__grid--solo modifier that drops the desktop 2-col layout and constrains copy to max-width 82rem centered. Liquid syntax gotcha caught on deploy: `assign X = Y != blank` is invalid — Liquid assign only accepts filters, not comparisons. Fixed with explicit if/endif flag assignment (commit f99cebb hotfix after cb2c65b). Verified: .pdp-brew__image-placeholder gone from DOM, .pdp-brew__grid--solo applied, copy column renders at 820px centered on desktop. Commits 43159fd + f99cebb.

tasks.description: BUG (live QA 2026-04-16): Console errors on live test PDP — 'Identifier DetailsDisclosure has already been declared' + same for DetailsModal, SearchForm, CartDrawer. Theme JS appears to be loading twice. Not PDP-specific but surfaced during PDP rebuild testing. Investigate theme.liquid script loading and deduplicate.
tasks.notes: Root cause: layout/theme.liquid lines 74-76 + 488 load details-disclosure.js / details-modal.js / search-form.js / cart-drawer.js globally. sections/header.liquid lines 203-208 also load the exact same 4 files, causing each class to be re-declared. Fix: removed those 4 `<script>` tags from header.liquid, kept cart-notification.js (unique to header). Also found a second dupe: swiper-bundle.min.js was loaded by both main-pdp-hero.liquid and pdp-cross-sell.liquid — removed from cross-sell since hero always renders first in template order. Post-fix: all 4 'Identifier … has already been declared' errors gone (console errors 5→1, remaining is unrelated 3rd-party 'unable to find element'). Remaining script dupes are 3rd-party (embed.js, dtag.js, loox, pixel.modern, Klaviyo vendor bundles) — those come from apps injecting themselves from multiple hooks, out of scope. Commit c9b422c.

tasks.description: POLISH (2026-04-16): Hide the current-format tab entirely in the hero format switcher (e.g., don't show Coffee tab on a Coffee PDP). Also support a current_format override so test products with non-standard handles can simulate the active format.
tasks.notes: snippets/pdp-format-switcher.liquid: switched render gate from `{% if exists %}` to `{% if exists and is_current == false %}` so the active-format tab is fully removed, not dimmed. Dropped the `is-current` class and 'Current' span from the tab button and simplified JS activate() accordingly. Added `current_format_override` param on the snippet + `format_switcher_current_format` select in main-pdp-hero schema so edge-case handles (the PDP Rebuild Test product's handle doesn't compute to any derived sibling handle) can force the current-format lock. Template product.pdp-rebuild.json sets format_switcher_current_format: 'coffee' for the test product — Shopify CLI push dropped it on first attempt, so force-pushed via Asset API PUT directly. Verified: tabCount 4→3 on test PDP (Tea / Instant Coffee / Instant Latte), Tea default-active, mobile 375px still fits cleanly. Commits 8bea41f + 95adda2.

tasks.description: POLISH (2026-04-16): Enlarge product card images in the flavor cross-sell — previous 1:1 square with internal padding read too small; want a pack-forward card with bigger pack photography.
tasks.notes: assets/component-pdp-sections.css: .pdp-cross-sell__card-frame padding 1.2rem → 0 with overflow:hidden; .pdp-cross-sell__card-media aspect-ratio 1/1 → 4/5 (portrait, matches bag proportions) with top corners rounded to inherit frame radius; .pdp-cross-sell__card-body gets 1.4rem 1.4rem 1.6rem padding of its own. Net effect: image area is ~40% larger visually and now reaches edge-to-edge for a cleaner storefront-tile feel. Commit 8bea41f.

tasks.description: BUG (2026-04-16 QA): Clicking the Subscribe & Save radio flipped the hidden selling_plan input but the visible price, compare-at, and SAVE% pill stayed frozen on one-time values — shopper saw no price feedback for choosing subscribe.
tasks.notes: sections/main-pdp-hero.liquid: subscribe_pct now computed against max(compare_at, price) so the SAVE pill works even on non-sale variants; compare-at <s> + save pill <span> are now always rendered (hidden when empty) so JS toggles visibility rather than injecting DOM. Stamped data-price / data-compare-at / data-save-pct (pre-formatted money strings) on both radios so JS does zero currency math. assets/pdp-hero.js: new applyPriceFromRadio() reads the active radio's attrs and writes them into [data-pdp-price]/[data-pdp-compare-at]/[data-pdp-save-pill]. Verified on test PDP (11 oz French Roast): one-time $16.99 / compare $18.49 / SAVE 8%; subscribe $13.25 / compare $18.49 / SAVE 28%; round-trips clean. Commits 2e66095 + 76a49a3.

docs.desc: Source of truth — reverse-engineered from the LIVE teeccino.com PDP on 2026-04-15 (supersedes pdp-replo-spec.md)
Legacy Replo-chunk reverse-engineering — kept for history. Do not build against this.
Existing early native product template (uses main-product-custom section)
